LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT REMARCK PARTNERS, LLC'S MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, FOR AN ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO DEPOSIT SECURITY, AND FOR AN ORDER PROHIBITING THE FILING OF ANY NEW LITIGATION BY PLAINTIFF WITHOUT LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE IS GRANTED. MOVANT MEETS REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 391 ET SEQ. AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE ANY OPPOSITION. IN LIEU OF SECURITY, DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF: $4065.00 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND $477.59 IN COSTS. THE DISMISSAL, PREVIOUSLY VACATED, IS REINSTATED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Dismissal Of Entire Action Filed (Sweep)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Declare Pltf A Vexatious Litigant, For An Order Requiring Pltf. To Desposit Security, And For An Order Prohibiting The Filing Of Any New Litigation By Pltff Without Leave Of The Presiding Judge
Off Calendar Aug-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jon Webster (925.686.8790) for defendant and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court modified its ruling as follows: DEFENDANT REMARCK PARTNERS, LLC'S MOTION TO DECLARE PLAINTIFF A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, FOR A ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO DEPOSIT SECURITY, AND FOR AN ORDER PROHIBITING THE FILING OF ANY NEW LITIGATION BY PLAINTIFF WITHOUT LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE is granted. Movant meets requirements of CCP 391 et seq. and plaintiff failed to file any opposition. In lieu of security, defendant is entitled to recover from plaintiff: $4065.00 in attorney's fees and $477.59 in costs. The dismissal, previously vacated is reinstated. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
